# NotebookLM-Career-Advisor

## Graphics generated by my NotebookLM Career Advisor Notebook.

The data source
These sources document the technical expertise and professional impact of a Senior Platform Engineer specializing in cloud infrastructure and data governance. The collection includes detailed guides on GitHub Actions, Snowflake database management, and Azure PostgreSQL configurations, emphasizing secure automation and Infrastructure as Code patterns. Performance reviews and personal project logs highlight a "talent multiplier" who mentors junior staff while architecting foundational systems for Airflow and Kubernetes. Technical summaries showcase extensive work with Terraform, specifically in building reusable modules, managing secrets, and implementing least-privilege RBAC models. Ultimately, the text defines a professional brand centered on architectural rigor, security-first automation, and the creation of durable platform patterns that scale across an organization.
